_instructions: Copy this file to family.config.json and edit it. family.config.json is gitignored — your personal data stays local.

owners._note: The shared / catch-all owner. isDefault:true = appears first in every dropdown.
owners.name: Everyone

owners._note: Fallback owner. isOther:true = appears last in dropdowns.
owners.name: Other

reviewers._note: Colors — bg: chip background, text: chip text, dot: accent dot. Light pastels work best.
reviewers.name: Alice
